name: Holua's Arcades
short_description: Master the golden age of the arcade! Holua’s Arcades packs four pixel-perfect challenges into one digital cabinet. Dominate a brutal 90s beat 'em up, survive a cosmic bullet hell, execute a stealthy ninja heist, and conquer a co-op precision platformer. Climb the global leaderboards today!
detailed_description:
Relive the golden age of the arcade.

Holua's Arcades delivers four complete, tightly crafted retro experiences packed into a single digital cabinet. Whether you crave the brutal combos of a 90s street brawl, the twitch-reflex tension of a cosmic bullet hell, or the pixel-perfect precision of a classic platformer, this collection is built to test your skills and dominate your free time.

Master the mechanics, climb the Steam Leaderboards, and prove you have the fastest thumbs in the arcade.

Four Games. Infinite replayability.

Don't mess with Rick (90s Beat 'em Up)

Step into the golden era of the arcade brawler. Kicked out of his own mob family, Rick is on a bloody quest for revenge across four grueling stages. This isn't just button-mashing; master a deep combat system featuring combos, clinches, parries, and counterattacks. Fill your super meter to unleash screen-clearing special moves as you fight through replicant ninjas, rabid dogs, and massive bosses.

Crescent Moon (Sci-Fi Shoot 'em Up)

A fast, frantic, horizontal bullet hell. The cosmic tyrant Trixion is invading, and you are the only defense. Memorize environmental traps, collect and swap between five distinct weapon types, and utilize support pods to survive. Built for high-score chasers: master the "No-Miss" multiplier system and dodge your way to the top of the leaderboards.

Heist of the Ninja (83' stealth arcade)

Experience classic single-screen arcade tension! Play as Koji the Ninja in an alternate-1983 heist. Navigate tightly guarded rooms, jump obstacles, and dig through furnishings for hidden loot. Use your shurikens wisely, outsmart the guards, and secure the treasure without triggering the alarm.

Peng Peng (Co-Op precision platformer)

Don't let the cute aesthetic fool you—Peng Peng is built for casuals, speedrunners, and hardcore score-catchers alike. Wipe out monsters across four worlds to rescue the kidnapped Frost Orb. Play solo or grab a friend in Local Co-Op. Will you rush to the end for a speed bonus, or meticulously clear enemies for maximum points? Hunt for secret rooms, special events, and uncover the hidden ending!

Step Into the Holua Universe...

Holua's Arcades is just the beginning. Meet Lyn, the vivacious gamer actually playing these arcade machines! Lyn is also the protagonist of our upcoming high-resolution metroidvania, FANTASY NETWORK.

Discover the meta-narrative linking these arcade classics to a much larger world. Play the hidden Demo level located just outside the virtual arcade room, and don't forget to wishlist Fantasy Network!
